title: 潛艇黃海中trap的事是不是真的？
meta_description: 潛艇黃海中trap的事是不是真的？ - 英媒daily mail報導  [url=https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-12602807/china-uk-spies-tracked-bugged-submarine-smart-watch.html]...
contents:
英媒daily mail報導

https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-12602807/china-uk-spies-tracked-bugged-submarine-smart-watch.html

EXCLUSIVE: Furious China believes UK spies tracked one of their submarines by bugging a sailor's Apple smart-watch before the vessel got caught in one of Beijing's own underwater traps, killing all on board

獨家報導：憤怒的中國認為，英國間諜透過竊聽一名水手的蘋果智慧手錶來追蹤他們的一艘潛艇，隨後這艘潛艇陷入了北京自己的水下陷阱，導致船上所有人死亡
